dictionary.shell.owner.title: Platform Control Center
dictionary.shell.owner.detail: See customer accounts, packages, revenue, runtime health, and incidents in one place.
dictionary.shell.tenant.title: Server Control Panel
dictionary.shell.tenant.detail: Manage server status, orders, players, delivery tools, and bots for this community.
dictionary.owner.app.card.loadingDetail: Loading customer accounts, runtime health, and current incidents for the owner workspace.
dictionary.owner.app.card.emptyDetail: Wait for the latest owner data to load.
dictionary.tenant.app.card.loadingDetail: Loading server status, orders, players, and support tools for this tenant.
dictionary.tenant.app.card.emptyDetail: Wait for the latest tenant data to load.
dictionary.tenant.notice.lockedTitle: This package has not opened this page yet
dictionary.tenant.notice.lockedDetail: This tenant does not have access to the selected workspace yet, so the system returned you to a page that is already available.
dictionary.tenant.notice.previewDetail: Preview tenants can open this page, but live actions stay disabled until setup is complete.
dictionary.tenant.notice.unknownTitle: We could not match that page
dictionary.tenant.notice.unknownDetail: The requested tenant page does not exist, so the workspace opened the daily overview instead.
dictionary.shell.player.title: Player Portal
dictionary.shell.player.detail: Shop, wallet, orders, stats, and community updates in one place.
dictionary.player.app.card.loadingDetail: Loading account, store, orders, and community updates.
dictionary.player.app.card.emptyDetail: Wait for the latest player data to load.
dictionary.player.notice.lockedTitle: This server has not opened this area yet
dictionary.player.notice.lockedDetail: This area is not included in the current server package yet, so the portal returned you to a page that is available now.
